message:
Add stockyard-snapshot vsock client for VMs

- vsock-based communication with host
- Unix socket fallback for testing
- Simple protocol: label length + label -> status + message
- Sanitizes labels for ZFS snapshot names
- Includes tests for sanitizeLabel function

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
